title: Everbuild Ready Mixed Deep Gap Filler, Light Grey, 1 Litre (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
REVOLUTIONARY FORMULA – Innovative ceramic spheres work to fill gaps up to 50mm deep in plaster, brick, wood, masonry and more instantly, with one application.
READY TO USE – Use it straight from the tub onto your substrate for an easy, simple gap filler.
NO SHRINKAGE MIXTURE – The lightweight ceramic spheres do not shrink in differing temperatures, so there's no chance of shrinking, cracking or sagging.
QUICK DRYING – Cures for decorating in as little as 30 minutes if the conditions are ideal.
NO NEED TO SAND – The paste formula sets to a naturally smooth finish no matter where you apply, so there's no need to sand before painting.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces must be clean, dry, free from dust, grease and other contamination. Stir EVERBUILD DEEP GAP FILLER to a smooth paste. If product is too dry, add a few drops of water and restir. Apply using a flexible filler knife, smoothing down to achieve a perfect surface that won’t need sanding. When filling a large surface area, it may not always be possible to achieve a completely level finish. When filling a large surface area, it may not always be possible to achieve a completely level finish. However, EVERBUILD DEEP GAP FILLER is very easy to sand if necessary.
